titleStmt.title: SII 7.329: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 329. (A.R. No. 138 of 1901). ON A SLAB LYING IN PARAMESVARABHATTA'S HOUSE IN THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracā
ravē . trayilōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī . ja
yābhyudaya sakhavaruśa 1282 neya varttamāna sārvvari saṁvatsarada mā
rgasira suddha 15 Ādivāra sōmagrahaṇadalli śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ [A]
rirāyavibhāḍa bhāsegetappuvarāyaragaṁḍa śrīvīrabukkaṁṇnavoḍeya
ra vijayarājyābhyudayadalu śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ malleyadaṁṇṇā
yakaru bārakūrarājyava nāḷuva kāladalu miseṭṭiyara maga nā
gaṁṇaseṭṭiyaru taṁbulageṟiya śrī sōmanāthadēvara sāṁnidhyadalu mā
ḍida dharma taṁma maṭhada chatrakke naḍava bāḷu basurūroḷage hiri
ya Allāḷaseṭṭiya kūḍe haccikoṁḍa bāḷinalli baha bhatta nāḍa
hāne 40 mūḍe 70 Alli tōṭada teḻiṁda baha ga 8 nū sōvaṇnaseṭṭi na
ḍasuvanu . mattaṁ bēḷūroḷage yeṁṭu vokkaliṁda naḍava bhatta mūḍe 400
kke maṭhada chatrakke 4 vokkaliṁda bhatta nāḍahāne 40 ṟa mūḍe 200 sirā
ṁgaseṭṭiyara vināyakadēvariṁge 4 vokkaliṁda naḍava bhatta nāḍahā
ne 40 ṟa mūḍe votada hānayalli 200 mattaṁ bukkapaṭṭaṇadalli tōṭada
teṟiṁda hoṟeyagēṇiyiṁda ga 78 mattaṁ kukkuḍeyoḷage koḷagaba
yala gēṇiyiṁda dēvaramuṁdaṇa raṁgavallige naḍava bhata mūḍe 24 maḍa
completely Effaced
mattaṁ haṁni ha sōmanāthadēvara hū
dōṭakke naḍava bhatta nāgaṁḍugada mūḍe 14 nū kōṭiseṭi naḍasuvanu mattaṁ
pāṁḍēsvaradēvaravareya hatti tana vudakke ti
ṁgaḷatiṁgaḷa Amāvāsege yēḷupādhya yarige nāgaṁṇaseṭeyara maṭhada
lli taṁdu naḍasuvanu maṭhada chatradali Uṁba brāhmaṇaru ja 18 maṭhada
kasava kaḷava besavittige bhatta mūḍe 5 hebbāraṁge ga
2 maṭhada keḍukelasava gayivana yiṁthī dharmavanu nā
gaṁṇaseṭṭiyara kuṭuṁbadavaru naḍasibaharu naḍasade vudāsīnaṁ
māḍe vuḷidaḍe sōmanāthadēvarū mūṟukēriya halarū vicārsi
Avara kayiṁda naḍasuvaru naḍasade vyathāyamāḍi vuḷidaḍe sōmanātha
dēvarū mūṟukēriya halarū naḍasuvaru dēvasvada vokka 1 ke nāgā
seṭṭiyarige . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī malleyadaṁṇāyakkara suhasta
da voppa . .
Digital edition of SII 7.329 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
